circular_oracle_check.verdict: 0.80 appears as: (a) preregistered floor for 'transport holds', (b) the boundary used to LOCATE tau, (c) the threshold tau sits at. These are the SAME 0.80, used consistently — not re-deployed as independent evidence. The paper does not claim '0.80 is hit by an independent test'; it claims tau is the overlap level where the preregistered 0.80 floor is first crossed. Not circular: definitional/consistent.
